Class EdtPropertyChangeListener

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.swing.internal.EdtPropertyChangeListener
All Implemented Interfaces:
HierarchyListener, PropertyChangeListener, EventListener
public class EdtPropertyChangeListener extends Object implements PropertyChangeListener, HierarchyListener
A smart, lifecycle-aware PropertyChangeListener that ensures UI updates occur on the Event Dispatch Thread (EDT). It automatically manages its subscription to the PropertyChangeSource based on the displayability of the associated JComponent.

This class eliminates the need for manual addNotify/removeNotify boilerplate and prevents memory leaks by unregistering itself when the component is removed from the UI hierarchy.

Author:
anahata

    EdtPropertyChangeListener.Mode
    The execution mode for thread switching.

    The reactive logic to execute on the EDT when a change is detected.

    The UI component whose displayability governs the listener's lifecycle.
    private final EdtPropertyChangeListener.Mode
    mode
    The strategy for thread-switching (Later vs.
    private final String
    propertyName
    The specific property name to filter for, or null to listen to all changes.
    private final PropertyChangeSource
    source
    The domain-level model providing the property change events.
    private boolean
    subscribed
    Tracks the current subscription state to prevent duplicate listeners.
    private final boolean
    triggerImmediately
    Whether to force an initial execution of the action upon subscription.

  • Field Details

    • component

      private final JComponent component
      The UI component whose displayability governs the listener's lifecycle.

    • source

      private final PropertyChangeSource source
      The domain-level model providing the property change events.

    • propertyName

      private final String propertyName
      The specific property name to filter for, or null to listen to all changes.

    • action

      private final Consumer<PropertyChangeEvent> action
      The reactive logic to execute on the EDT when a change is detected.

    • mode

      private final EdtPropertyChangeListener.Mode mode
      The strategy for thread-switching (Later vs. Wait).

    • triggerImmediately

      private final boolean triggerImmediately
      Whether to force an initial execution of the action upon subscription.

    • subscribed

      private boolean subscribed
      Tracks the current subscription state to prevent duplicate listeners.

  • Constructor Details

    • EdtPropertyChangeListener

      public EdtPropertyChangeListener(@NonNull @NonNull JComponent component, @NonNull @NonNull PropertyChangeSource source, String propertyName, @NonNull @NonNull Consumer<PropertyChangeEvent> action)
      Constructs a new EdtPropertyChangeListener and binds it to the component's lifecycle.
      Parameters:
      component - The UI component whose lifecycle determines the subscription.
      source - The model object providing property change events.
      propertyName - The name of the property to listen for, or null for all properties.
      action - The action to perform on the EDT when the property changes.

    • EdtPropertyChangeListener

      public EdtPropertyChangeListener(@NonNull @NonNull JComponent component, @NonNull @NonNull PropertyChangeSource source, String propertyName, @NonNull @NonNull Consumer<PropertyChangeEvent> action, @NonNull @NonNull EdtPropertyChangeListener.Mode mode, boolean triggerImmediately)
      Constructs a new EdtPropertyChangeListener with full control over its behavior.
      Parameters:
      component - The UI component whose lifecycle determines the subscription.
      source - The model object providing property change events.
      propertyName - The name of the property to listen for, or null for all properties.
      action - The action to perform on the EDT when the property changes.
      mode - The thread switching mode.
      triggerImmediately - If true, the action will be triggered immediately upon subscription.

  • Method Details

    • propertyChange

      public void propertyChange(PropertyChangeEvent evt)

      Orchestrates the thread-switch to the EDT using the configured EdtPropertyChangeListener.Mode. Ensures that the UI action is executed safely regardless of which thread fired the model event.

      Specified by:
      propertyChange in interface PropertyChangeListener

    • hierarchyChanged

      public void hierarchyChanged(HierarchyEvent e)

      Monitors the component's HierarchyEvent.DISPLAYABILITY_CHANGED flag. This is the "magic" that allows the listener to automatically connect to or disconnect from the model as the UI is shown or hidden.

      Specified by:
      hierarchyChanged in interface HierarchyListener

    • unbind

      public void unbind()
      Explicitly unbinds the listener from both the component and the source.

    • updateSubscription

      private void updateSubscription()
      Adds or removes this listener from the model source based on the component's displayability.
